title: build_shielded_tx anchor_height precondition unenforced: wrong height causes cryptic proof failure
description: build_shielded_tx doc states anchor_height must equal WalletStore::scan_tip(), not note.block_height. There is no runtime enforcement: a caller passing note.block_height (the natural mistake) will get AnchorMismatch or a cryptic builder error from the prover, not a clear diagnostic. The current callers in payment.rs read scan_tip() correctly, but this is load-bearing implicit caller discipline. Fix: accept anchor_height from the call site but assert it matches the first witness's computed root at the tree's expected height, or at minimum add a debug_assert comparing anchor_height to scan_tip() when a WalletStore reference is available.
